evals.prompt: Audit all skills under ./.ai-context/skills and generate both JSON and HTML outputs. Exclude skill-quality-auditor from the scan.
evals.expected_output: A ranked quality report with per-skill scores, quality bands, evidence, and recommendations, plus a static HTML dashboard.
expectations: The output JSON contains summary.total_skills and summary.by_band.
Every analyzed skill has total_score, quality_band, criteria, and recommendations fields.
At least one poor/fair/good classification appears in realistic repositories.
A static HTML dashboard file is generated and references the same JSON-derived data.

evals.prompt: Run the auditor against a subset of skills and return the top 5 highest quality skills and the poor-quality list.
evals.expected_output: A deterministic ranking plus a filtered list of poor-quality skills from the computed report.
expectations: Skills are sorted by descending total_score.
Poor-quality list only includes skills with score below 60.
Top 5 list contains exactly 5 entries when at least 5 skills exist.

evals.prompt: Inspect output evidence quality for two random skills and verify that each criterion has non-empty evidence entries.
evals.expected_output: Evidence arrays are present and useful for interpretation across all criteria.
expectations: Each criterion object includes score, max_score, status, and evidence.
Evidence arrays are not empty for scored criteria.
Critical issues are traceable back to at least one criterion status marked critical.
